title: Reference module ports don't work when modules aren't inlined

features.name: ref port declaration on module
features.description: Code should include a module with a ref port declaration that accepts an external variable

features.name: static task accessing ref variable
features.description: Code should include a static task that accesses a ref variable passed from an external scope

features.name: module instantiation with ref port connection
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with a ref port connected to an external variable, used with non-inlined compilation

features.name: static task call on module instance
features.description: Code should include calling a static task on a module instance to access a ref port value
